nodes.label: कौन? (Who?)
nodes.description: A mysterious poem full of questions about the wonders of nature

nodes.label: प्रकृति के तत्व (Elements of Nature)
nodes.description: The natural elements mentioned in the poem that inspire wonder

nodes.label: फूल (Flowers)
nodes.description: Who fills beautiful colours in flowers? A question about nature's art

nodes.label: तारे (Stars)
nodes.description: Who gives shine and sparkle to the stars at night?

nodes.label: नदी (River)
nodes.description: Who teaches the rivers to flow and make sweet sounds?

nodes.label: बादल और हवा (Clouds & Wind)
nodes.description: Who makes clouds rain and who makes the wind blow?

nodes.label: काव्य विशेषताएँ (Poetic Features)
nodes.description: Special literary features that make this poem beautiful and memorable

nodes.label: प्रश्न शैली (Question Style)
nodes.description: The entire poem is written as questions, creating curiosity

nodes.label: तुकबंदी (Rhyming)
nodes.description: Lines end with matching sounds, making the poem musical

nodes.label: पुनरुक्ति (Repetition)
nodes.description: The word 'कौन?' repeats throughout, creating rhythm and emphasis

nodes.label: भाव (Feelings/Themes)
nodes.description: The emotions and ideas the poem evokes in readers

nodes.label: जिज्ञासा (Curiosity)
nodes.description: The poem sparks a desire to know and understand the world around us

nodes.label: आश्चर्य (Wonder)
nodes.description: A sense of amazement at the beauty and mystery of nature

nodes.label: प्रकृति प्रेम (Love for Nature)
nodes.description: The poem inspires love, respect, and appreciation for the natural world
